    Index

    A B C D E F G I L M N P R S T U V 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    A

    addAlert(BudgetAlert) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a budget alert and persists it.
    addBudget(Budget) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new budget and persists it.
    addCategory(Category) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new category and persists it.
    addContribution(FinancialGoal, BigDecimal) - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Submits the contribution amount to the specified goal object.
    addContribution(BigDecimal) - Method in class Goals.FinancialGoal
    Adds money to the goal's current amount and updates status.
    addGoal() - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Prompts the user to create a new financial goal.
    addGoal(FinancialGoal) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new goal and persists it.
    addNotification(Notification) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a notification and persists it.
    addProfile(UserProfile) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new profile and persists the change.
    addTransaction(Transaction) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new transaction and persists it.
    addTransaction(Transaction) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Adds a transaction to the in-memory cache.
    addUser(User) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Adds a new user and persists the change.
    addUser(User, UserProfile) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Caches a user and their profile.
    Admin - Class in Auth
    Represents an administrator account in the Personal Budgeting System.
    Admin(int) - Constructor for class Auth.Admin
    Constructs a new Admin with the specified ID.
    Auth - package Auth
     

    B

    Budget - package Budget
     
    Budget - Class in Budget
    Represents a budget set by a user for a specific category.
    Budget() - Constructor for class Budget.Budget
    Constructs a new Budget with default starting values.
    BudgetAlert - Class in Budget
    Represents an alert generated by the system when a budget crosses a threshold.
    BudgetAlert() - Constructor for class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Constructs an empty BudgetAlert.
    BudgetAlert(int, int, String, String) - Constructor for class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Constructs a new BudgetAlert.
    BudgetAlert(int, String, String) - Constructor for class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Legacy constructor (without userID).
    BudgetUI - Class in UI
    Handles the user interface for budget management.
    BudgetUI(Scanner, User) - Constructor for class UI.BudgetUI
    Constructs a new BudgetUI.

    C

    calcRemaining() - Method in class Budget.Budget
    Calculates the remaining amount in the budget before the limit is hit.
    calcRemaining() - Method in class Goals.FinancialGoal
    Calculates how much more money is needed to reach the target.
    calcRemaining(FinancialGoal) - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Calculates the remaining amount needed for the goal.
    Category - Class in Transaction
    Represents a category for grouping transactions.
    Category() - Constructor for class Transaction.Category
    Constructs an empty Category.
    Category(String, boolean) - Constructor for class Transaction.Category
    Constructs a new Category with a specific name.
    Category(String, boolean, String) - Constructor for class Transaction.Category
    Constructs a new Category with a specific name and icon.
    changeCurrency(String) - Method in class Auth.UserProfile
    Changes the preferred currency for this profile.
    changeLanguage(String) - Method in class Auth.UserProfile
    Changes the preferred language for this profile.
    checkThreshold() - Method in class Budget.Budget
    Checks if the spent amount has crossed the alert threshold or limit.
    checkThreshold() - Method in class UI.DashboardUI
    Checks all budgets for threshold breaches.
    checkThreshold(Budget) - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Checks the threshold for a specific budget directly.
    clearSession() - Method in class data.DataStore
    Clears the active session (logout).
    configureCategories() - Method in class Auth.Admin
    Configures the default and custom transaction categories available in the system.
    contributeToGoal() - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Prompts the user to add a monetary contribution to an existing goal.
    create() - Method in class Budget.Budget
    Initializes the budget and triggers the initial threshold check.
    create() - Method in class Goals.FinancialGoal
    Confirms the creation of the goal to the console.
    create(String, String) - Method in class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Creates and returns a new BudgetAlert instance based on current details.
    createBudget() - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Prompts the user to create a new budget for a category.
    createBudget(Category, BigDecimal, String, int) - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Programmatically creates a budget.
    createGoal(String, BigDecimal, Date, BigDecimal) - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Programmatically creates a goal.

    D

    DashboardUI - Class in UI
    Handles the main dashboard interface for logged-in users.
    DashboardUI(Scanner, User) - Constructor for class UI.DashboardUI
    Constructs a new DashboardUI for a specific user.
    data - package data
     
    DataManager - Class in data
    Handles all file-based data persistence for the Personal Budgeting System.
    DataManager() - Constructor for class data.DataManager
     
    DataStore - Class in data
    An in-memory data store for managing the active session and transactions.
    delete() - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Soft deletes this transaction by setting its amount to zero.
    dismiss() - Method in class Notifications.Notification
    Dismisses this notification (also marks as read).
    displayBarChart(Map) - Method in class UI.ReportUI
    Renders a simulated ASCII bar chart (relative breakdown) of expenses.
    displayBudgets() - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Retrieves and displays all active budgets for the current user.
    displayDashboard() - Method in class UI.DashboardUI
    Displays the dashboard summary (balance, recents, warnings, goals).
    displayExportOptions() - Method in class UI.ExportUI
    Displays the export menu and prompts the user for format and date range.
    displayForm() - Method in class UI.LoginUI
    Displays the login form and prompts for credentials.
    displayForm() - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Displays the sign-up form and prompts for user details.
    displayForm() - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Displays the recent transactions list.
    displayGoals() - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Retrieves and displays all active financial goals for the current user.
    displayNotifications() - Method in class UI.NotificationUI
    Fetches and displays the user's notifications in reverse chronological order.
    displayPieChart(Map) - Method in class UI.ReportUI
    Renders a simulated ASCII pie chart (percentage breakdown) of expenses.
    displayProfile() - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Displays the current user's profile details.
    displaySettings() - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Prompts the user to change their preferred currency and saves the change.
    downloadFile(String) - Method in class UI.ExportUI
    Confirms the generated file name and location to the user.

    E

    edit(String, String) - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Edits the category and description of this transaction.
    editBudget() - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Prompts the user to edit an existing budget's limit and threshold.
    emailExists(String) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Checks if an email is already registered in the store.
    EXPENSE - Enum constant in enum class Transaction.Transaction.TransactionType
     
    exportData() - Method in class Auth.UserProfile
    Returns a string representation of this profile suitable for data export.
    ExportUI - Class in UI
    Handles the user interface for exporting data to files.
    ExportUI(Scanner, User) - Constructor for class UI.ExportUI
    Constructs a new ExportUI.

    F

    fetchTransactions(String) - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Fetches and filters the user's transactions based on the query.
    filterByCategory(String) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Filters transactions by category.
    filterByType(Transaction.TransactionType) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Filters transactions by their type (income/expense).
    filterTransactions() - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Prompts the user to filter transactions and displays the result.
    FinancialGoal - Class in Goals
    Represents a financial goal set by a user.
    FinancialGoal() - Constructor for class Goals.FinancialGoal
    Constructs a new FinancialGoal with zero initial contribution.
    findUser(String, String) - Method in class data.DataStore
    Attempts to log in a user with the given credentials.
    findUserByEmail(String) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Finds a user by their email address.
    findUserByID(int) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Finds a user by their unique ID.
    formatData(String, List, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class Reports.Report
    Formats the provided data into a summary string.

    G

    generate() - Method in class Reports.Report
    Generates the report and prints it to the console.
    generate(String, String) - Method in class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Generates the alert and creates a corresponding system notification.
    generateFile(String, LocalDate, LocalDate, boolean, boolean, boolean) - Method in class UI.ExportUI
    Filters transactions and generates the chosen export file.
    generateSystemReport() - Method in class Auth.Admin
    Generates a system-wide report covering all users and transactions.

    getRecentTransactions() - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Retrieves the up to 5 most recent transactions for the user.

    Retrieves the most recent transactions up to a certain count.

    Retrieves a list of recent transactions for a user.

    Retrieves the newly registered user, if successful.

    Calculates the total balance for the user (income - expenses).

    L

    loadAll() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Loads all application data from the file system.

    Loads recent transactions for the dashboard view.

    Authenticates the user against the provided credentials.

    Attempts to log in a user with the provided credentials.

    Logs the user out of the current session.

    Logs the current user out.

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class Main
    The main method that starts the application.
    Main - Class in Unnamed Package
    The main entry point for the Personal Budgeting System (Masroofy).
    Main() - Constructor for class Main
     
    manageUsers() - Method in class Auth.Admin
    Performs user management operations such as viewing or removing users.
    markAsRead() - Method in class Budget.BudgetAlert
    Marks this alert as read by the user.
    markAsRead() - Method in class Notifications.Notification
    Marks this notification as read.
    markAsRead(int) - Method in class UI.NotificationUI
    Updates the persistence layer to mark a specific notification as read.

    N

    navigateToSource(List) - Method in class UI.NotificationUI
    Displays the full source text of a notification.

    Represents a system notification sent to a user.

    Constructs a new Notification.

    Handles the user interface for system notifications.

    R

    redirectToDashboard() - Method in class UI.LoginUI
    Displays a success message upon login.

    Refreshes dashboard data and triggers background checks.

    Validates the user's registration data.
    register(String, String, String) - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Creates and registers a new user in the system.
    removeTransaction(int) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Removes a transaction by its ID and persists the change.

    Represents a generated financial report for a specific period.

    Constructs an empty Report.

    Constructs a new Report for a given user and period.

    S

    save() - Method in class Auth.UserSetting
    Persists the current settings.
    save() - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Validates this transaction for saving.
    saveAlerts() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the budget alerts list to disk.
    saveAll() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves all current application data to the file system.
    saveBudgets() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the budgets list to disk.
    saveCategories() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the categories list to disk.
    saveChanges() - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Generic method to confirm that settings were saved.
    saveChanges(String) - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Confirm a currency change and triggers a system update notification.
    saveGoals() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the goals list to disk.
    saveNotifications() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the notifications list to disk.
    saveProfiles() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the user profiles list to disk.
    saveTransactions() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the transactions list to disk.
    saveUsers() - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Saves the users list to disk.

    Prompts the user for a date range and generates a report.

    Simulates sending the alert directly.

    showAlert(String, BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Displays a warning alert if a budget threshold is exceeded or if a conflict occurs.
    showBudgetWarning() - Method in class UI.DashboardUI
    Checks and displays any budget warnings (spent >= 80% limit).
    showEmpty() - Method in class UI.NotificationUI
    Prints a message when there are no notifications.
    showEmpty() - Method in class UI.ReportUI
    Shows a message if no data exists.
    showError(String) - Method in class UI.LoginUI
    Displays an error message upon failed login.
    showError(String) - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Displays an error message upon failed registration.
    showError(String) - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Displays an error message.
    showErrorMessage() - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Displays an error message indicating an update failure.
    showGoalsSummary() - Method in class UI.DashboardUI
    Displays a summary of the user's financial goals.
    showInsight(String) - Method in class UI.ReportUI
    Displays a financial insight based on the report.
    showProgressBar(BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Renders an ASCII progress bar representing budget usage.
    showProgressBar(BigDecimal, BigDecimal) - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Renders an ASCII progress bar for the goal.
    showSuccess() - Method in class UI.ExportUI
    Displays a generic success message upon successful export.
    showSuccess() - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Displays a generic success message.
    showSuccess(String) - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Displays a customized success message.
    SignUpUI - Class in UI
    Handles the user interface for the registration process.
    SignUpUI(Scanner) - Constructor for class UI.SignUpUI
    Constructs a new SignUpUI.
    start() - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Starts the budget UI loop, displaying budgets and the menu.
    start() - Method in class UI.DashboardUI
    Starts the dashboard session, displaying the main menu loop.
    start() - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Starts the goals UI loop, displaying active goals and the main menu.
    start() - Method in class UI.LoginUI
    Starts the login process.
    start() - Method in class UI.ProfileUI
    Starts the profile UI loop, allowing viewing or updating settings.
    start() - Method in class UI.ReportUI
    Starts the report UI loop.
    start() - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Starts the registration process.
    start() - Method in class UI.TransactionUI
    Starts the transaction UI loop, showing recent transactions and the main menu.
    submitRegistration() - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Displays a success message upon completed registration.

    T

    toggleBudgetAlerts() - Method in class Auth.UserSetting
    Toggles the budget alerts flag on or off and prints the new state.
    toggleGoalReminders() - Method in class Auth.UserSetting
    Toggles the goal reminders flag on or off and prints the new state.
    toString() - Method in class Notifications.Notification
    Returns a formatted string representation of this notification.
    toString() - Method in class Transaction.Category
    Returns a string representation of this category.
    toString() - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Returns a fully detailed string representation of this transaction.
    toString() - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Returns a string representation of this UI component.
    toSummaryString() - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Returns a summarized string representation of this transaction.
    Transaction - package Transaction
     
    Transaction - Class in Transaction
    Represents a financial transaction (income or expense).
    Transaction(double, String, String, String, Transaction.TransactionType, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class Transaction.Transaction
    Constructs a new Transaction without a specific user ID (defaults to 0).
    Transaction(int, double, String, String, String, Transaction.TransactionType, LocalDateTime) - Constructor for class Transaction.Transaction
    Constructs a new Transaction with a specific user ID.
    Transaction.TransactionType - Enum Class in Transaction
    Defines the possible types of a transaction.
    TransactionUI - Class in UI
    Handles the user interface for transaction management.
    TransactionUI(Scanner, User) - Constructor for class UI.TransactionUI
    Constructs a new TransactionUI.

    U

    UI - package UI
     
    update() - Method in class Auth.UserSetting
    Applies the current settings and notifies the user.
    update() - Method in class Budget.Budget
    Prints a confirmation message when a budget is updated.
    update(Budget, BigDecimal, int) - Method in class UI.BudgetUI
    Programmatically updates a budget's limit and threshold.
    update(String, String, String) - Method in class Auth.UserProfile
    Updates profile fields with the provided values.
    updateBudget(Budget) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Updates an existing budget and persists the change.
    updateGoal(FinancialGoal) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Updates an existing goal and persists the change.
    updateIsRead(int, boolean) - Method in class Notifications.Notification
    Updates the read status if the ID matches.
    updateNotification(Notification) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Updates an existing notification and persists the change.
    updateProfile(UserProfile) - Static method in class data.DataManager
    Updates an existing profile and persists the change.
    updateProgress(FinancialGoal) - Method in class UI.GoalUI
    Checks and displays the current completion status of a goal.
    updateSpentAmount(double) - Method in class Transaction.Transaction
    Updates the transaction amount.
    updateSpentAmount(BigDecimal) - Method in class Budget.Budget
    Adds to the spent amount and triggers a threshold check.
    User - Class in Auth
    Represents a registered user in the Personal Budgeting System.
    User(String, String, String) - Constructor for class Auth.User
    Constructs a new User with an auto-incremented ID.
    UserProfile - Class in Auth
    Stores the display preferences and profile information for a user.
    UserProfile(int, String) - Constructor for class Auth.UserProfile
    Constructs a new UserProfile with default settings.
    UserSetting - Class in Auth
    Stores notification and display settings for a user account.
    UserSetting() - Constructor for class Auth.UserSetting
     

    V

    validateInput(String, String) - Method in class UI.SignUpUI
    Validates the format of the provided email and password.
    valueOf(String) - Static method in enum class Transaction.Transaction.TransactionType
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    values() - Static method in enum class Transaction.Transaction.TransactionType
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.
    verifyCredentials(String, String) - Method in class Auth.UserProfile
    Verifies that both email and password are non-blank.
